adc_env_cfg

Configuration class for the ADC environment.

Variables
vif_clk
virtual oscillator_if vif_clk

Virtual interface for the system clock agent.

vif_reset
virtual bit_bus_if #(
.
WIDTH(1)
) vif_reset

Virtual interface for the reset signal bus.

vif_spi
virtual spi_if vif_spi

Virtual interface for the SPI agent.

vif_adc
virtual oscillator_if vif_adc

Virtual interface for the digital portion of the ADC input bus, which is a UVM-MS extension of oscillator_agent.

vproxy_adc
sine_proxy vproxy_adc

Proxy used to monitor ADC input amplitude.

checks_enable
bit checks_enable

If 1, enables any defined internal SVA checks on the agents.

coverage_enable
bit coverage_enable

If 1, enables building and collection of any coverage defined by the agents or the env.

spi_clk_frequency
real spi_clk_frequency

Frequency in Hz that the SPI clock must run at. 10 kHz probably good for implementation, 2 MHz good for early simulation.

system_clk_frequency
int system_clk_frequency

The frequency in Hz that the system clock must run at. Eventually, set to be the same speed as they PCB oscillator and assume an internal PLL, so maybe 5-12 MHz is good.

reset_reg_rb_name
string reset_reg_rb_name

The name of the field used to readback reset. Used for the ADC reset_phase, so important.

reset_duration
real reset_duration

The duration in seconds that the reset pulse will last at the start of simulation.
